title: Fan Made DVD sets
wikitext:
[]: Fan Made DVD sets             Quote Post by Robowang » Sat Mar 28, 2020 7:56 pm Does anyone know of a torrent or download for some kind of fan-designed "ultimate set"? Something with "the best" subtitle translation, the dub track, maybe even all placed over a blu-ray rip? I haven't had much luck searching, but someone has to have something like this available...

[]: Re: Fan Made DVD sets             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Mar 28, 2020 9:41 pm I'm fairly certain that asking for specific sources for pirated content goes against the TOS of the forum; if you know where to look, you'll find plenty stuff like that. If you don't know where to look, keep your nose out of that stuff entirely, or chances are you'll catch a virus that might just brick your system
